readme.purpose: Income from sources OUTSIDE the simulator accounts. The accounts in allocation_yearly.json (brokerage, TRAD IRA, Roth IRA) handle their own distributions, dividends, and capital gains internally — do NOT re-enter those here. This file is for income that arrives independently: salary, rental properties, pensions, Social Security, outside brokerage accounts not in the simulator, etc.
readme.what_not_to_enter: Do NOT enter: dividends or gains from accounts defined in allocation_yearly.json (those are computed from dist.yield_annual in assets.json), RMDs (computed automatically from TRAD IRA balances and rmd.json table), Roth conversion amounts (set in person.json roth_conversion_policy). Entering these here causes double-counting.
readme.gross_amounts: All amounts are GROSS (pre-tax). The simulator computes federal, state, NIIT, and excise taxes on top. Do NOT enter net/after-tax amounts.
readme.years_format: Use 'N-M' e.g. '1-5', '6-30'. Ranges must not overlap within a category. Missing years default to 0.
readme.amount_nom: Gross nominal dollar amount for that year range. Enter in today's dollars — inflation_yearly.json adjusts these forward each year.
readme.tax_stacking_note: Income entered here stacks at the BOTTOM of the tax bracket — below RMDs and Roth conversions. Higher income here means less bracket headroom for tax-efficient Roth conversions. The bracket-fill logic in person.json reads this income first when computing remaining room before the target bracket ceiling.

income_types.w2: Gross wages, salary, or self-employment income from employment outside the portfolio. Ordinary income rates. Subject to FICA if still working.
income_types.rental: Net rental income from properties outside the simulator accounts, after operating expenses (mortgage interest, depreciation, repairs). Subject to ordinary income tax — enter the net taxable amount.
income_types.interest: Taxable interest from bank accounts, CDs, bonds held outside the simulator accounts. Ordinary income rates.
income_types.ordinary_other: Any other ordinary income not covered above: pension distributions, annuity payments, Social Security taxable portion, alimony, etc.
income_types.qualified_div: Qualified dividends from stocks or funds held outside the simulator accounts. Taxed at LTCG rates (0/15/20%). Enter gross amount.
income_types.cap_gains: Realized capital gains from assets outside the simulator accounts — sale of real estate, stock in an outside brokerage, business interests, etc. Taxed at LTCG rates.
